html:
Exclusive to:

Mussels are naturally spawning objects introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They appear as clusters of three oval shadows in the Shallow Ocean that the player can move towards in a Boat. In order to harvest them, the player can craft a Mussel Stick and wait a minimum of one day, then the Mussel Stick will be coated in Mussels. When harvested, this results in one, three, or six Mussels, depending on how long the player left the stick in the Mussel Bed. The Mussel Bed and stick are consumed by this.

Alternatively, the player can sail over the Mussel Bed using a Trawl Net attached to the boat. This will consume the Mussel Bed and place 1 Mussel in the Trawl Net.

New Mussels will spawn randomly to replace those consumed. They can also be planted by the player by crafting a Mussel Bed.

Mussel Bed

The Mussel Bed is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Food Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and a Mussel and a Coral to craft. It allows the player to plant new Mussel Beds in the Shallow Ocean.

Trivia

  • The ability to plant new Mussel Beds was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
  • As of the Hang Ten! update, Mussels attached to a Mussel Stick do not perish. The player can use this to their advantage, saving Mussels in the event of food shortages.

Gallery

  • A Mussel Bed found in the Shallow Ocean.
Craftable ItemsStructures

“I wonder if they are from Brussels.”
–Wilson
“Just out of reach.”
–Willow
“Strangely named. They have no muscles.”
–Wolfgang
“They don't look that tough to me.”
–Wendy
“PROTEIN CONGREGATION POINT”
–WX-78
“I can't quite reach them from here.”
–Wickerbottom
“They want to be food.”
–Woodie
“It appears to be a convenient gathering of food.”
–Maxwell
“What fantastic creatures lurk in its depths?”
–Wagstaff
“It builds mussels.”
–Wigfrid
“Yuck.”
–Webber
“There's food hanging out down there.”
–Walani
“A delightful seafood dinner dwells there.”
–Warly
“Scoop 'em up!”
–Woodlegs
“INSHELL'D MEAT RESIDE YONDER”
–Wilba
“Why you hiding?”
–Wormwood
“What are they doing way down there?”
–Wheeler
Mussels are naturally spawning objects introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They appear as clusters of three oval shadows in the Shallow Ocean that the player can move towards in a Boat. In order to harvest them, the player can craft a Mussel Stick and wait a minimum of one day, then the Mussel Stick will be coated in Mussels. When harvested, this results in one, three, or six Mussels, depending on how long the player left the stick in the Mussel Bed. The Mussel Bed and stick are consumed by this.
Alternatively, the player can sail over the Mussel Bed using a Trawl Net attached to the boat. This will consume the Mussel Bed and place 1 Mussel in the Trawl Net.
New Mussels will spawn randomly to replace those consumed. They can also be planted by the player by crafting a Mussel Bed.
Mussel Bed[edit | edit source]
Mussel Bed
"Relocate your favorite mollusc."

"mussel_bed"
“I should find a good spot for these.”
–Wilson
“Guess I should chuck'em in the ocean.”
–Willow
“Tiny mussels should be in water!”
–Wolfgang
“They yearn for the deep.”
–Wendy
“THEY LIVE IN THE WATER AND ARE HORRIBLE”
–WX-78
“These mollusks will be sure to thrive once planted.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not doin' me any good unplanted.”
–Woodie
“They'll grow where I tell them to.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, I can farm my own bivalve molluscs here.”
–Wagstaff
“Sea meat in the making.”
–Wigfrid
“They'd be happier in the water.”
–Webber
“I should plant it before the poor things dry out.”
–Walani
“Imagine! Fresh mussels, whenever I desire!”
–Warly
“Ye'll b'returned t'th'sea.”
–Woodlegs
“INSHELL'D MEAT SLEEPETH YONDER”
–Wilba
“Needs sea”
–Wormwood
“Not much use out of the water.”
–Wheeler
The Mussel Bed is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Food Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and a Mussel and a Coral to craft. It allows the player to plant new Mussel Beds in the Shallow Ocean.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The ability to plant new Mussel Beds was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
As of the Hang Ten! update, Mussels attached to a Mussel Stick do not perish. The player can use this to their advantage, saving Mussels in the event of food shortages.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vẹm là vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng xuất hiện dưới dạng cụm ba bóng hình bầu dục ở vùng biển nông mà người chơi có thể di chuyển tới đó bằng Thuyền. Để thu hoạch chúng, người chơi có thể chế tạo một Que Vẹm và đợi tối thiểu một ngày, sau đó Thanh Vẹm sẽ được phủ một lớp Vẹm. Khi thu hoạch, điều này sẽ tạo ra một, ba hoặc sáu Con Trai, tùy thuộc vào thời gian người chơi để cây gậy trong Giường Trai. Giường Vẹm và cây gậy sẽ bị tiêu hao bởi thứ này.

'''Mussels''' are naturally spawning objects introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They appear as clusters of three oval shadows in the [[Ocean#Shipwrecked|Shallow Ocean]] that the player can move towards in a [[Boats|Boat]]. In order to harvest them, the player can craft a [[Mussel Stick]] and wait a minimum of one day, then the Mussel Stick will be coated in Mussels. When harvested, this results in one, three, or six Mussels, depending on how long the player left the stick in the Mussel Bed. The Mussel Bed and stick are consumed by this.

Alternatively, the player can sail over the Mussel Bed using a [[Trawl Net]] attached to the boat. This will consume the Mussel Bed and place 1 Mussel in the Trawl Net.

New Mussels will spawn randomly to replace those consumed. They can also be planted by the player by crafting a Mussel Bed.

The '''Mussel Bed''' is a craftable [[Item]] introduced in the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC. It is found in the [[Food Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and a [[Mussel]] and a [[Coral]] to craft. It allows the player to plant new Mussel Beds in the [[Ocean#Shipwrecked|Shallow Ocean]].

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The ability to plant new Mussel Beds was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
* As of the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Hang Ten!]]'' update, Mussels attached to a Mussel Stick do not perish. The player can use this to their advantage, saving Mussels in the event of food shortages.
